description.unified: Deals Physical DMG to all enemies and knocks them back. This skill is applied as a normal attack.
Deals Physical DMG 5 times to a random enemy and nearby enemies, reducing their Attack Speed by 12% for 8 sec. Against non-hero enemies, deals additional Physical DMG.

On Normal Attack, fires an additional projectile that deals extra Physical DMG to all enemies and increases your Attack by 0.5% for 10 sec. The Attack increase stacks up to 100 times and cannot be dispelled.
[Roll Over] increases DMG by {0}% on every use and recovers 120 MP upon a Crit Hit. This effect Stacks up to max 10 times.
